stimulus: On December 14, 2022, an unexpected cold front disrupted continental rail freight. A southbound coal train derailed in the Vrana Pass, a critical corridor linking the Adriatic coast with Central European refineries. Crews needed eleven days to clear ______blank the gradient of the pass and the volume of cars involved.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. A comma correctly marks the boundary between the main clause ("Crews needed…wreckage") and the supplementary prepositional phrase ("largely because of…involved") that explains the delay. No comma is needed inside "because of."

Choice A is incorrect because the comma after "of" wrongly splits the preposition from its object. Choice B is incorrect because, with no comma after "wreckage," the prepositional phrase reads as a restrictive modifier of an entire clause, which is awkward at the seam. Choice D duplicates the error in A.
